items.definition_en: An orange is a round, sweet fruit with a thick skin.
items.example_en: She eats an orange every morning.

items.definition_en: A pear is a sweet fruit that is usually green or yellow.
items.example_en: I have a pear in my lunchbox.

items.definition_en: A grape is a small, round fruit that grows in bunches.
items.example_en: He likes to eat grapes for a snack.

items.definition_en: A strawberry is a small, red fruit with tiny seeds on its skin.
items.example_en: We picked strawberries at the farm.

items.definition_en: A kiwi is a small, brown fruit with green flesh.
items.example_en: She sliced a kiwi for her salad.

items.definition_en: A pineapple is a large, tropical fruit with tough skin and sweet, yellow flesh.
items.example_en: He added pineapple to the pizza.

items.definition_en: A watermelon is a big fruit with green skin and red, juicy flesh.
items.example_en: They shared a watermelon at the picnic.

items.definition_en: A plum is a small, round fruit with purple or red skin.
items.example_en: I ate a plum after breakfast.

items.definition_en: A peach is a sweet fruit with fuzzy skin and soft flesh.
items.example_en: She likes her yogurt with peach.

items.definition_en: A cherry is a small, round, red fruit with a stone.
items.example_en: He put a cherry on the cake.

items.definition_en: A lemon is a yellow fruit that tastes sour.
items.example_en: Add lemon to the tea for flavor.

items.definition_en: A blueberry is a small, blue fruit that grows in clusters.
items.example_en: She baked a blueberry pie.

items.definition_en: A mango is a tropical fruit with orange flesh and sweet taste.
items.example_en: We had mango for dessert.

items.definition_en: An apricot is a small, orange fruit with soft skin.
items.example_en: He bought a basket of apricots.

items.definition_en: A raspberry is a small, soft, red fruit made of tiny sections.
items.example_en: Raspberry jam is her favorite.

items.definition_en: A blackberry is a dark fruit with small round parts stuck together.
items.example_en: We found wild blackberries in the woods.

items.definition_en: A grapefruit is a large, round fruit with pink or yellow flesh.
items.example_en: He had half a grapefruit for breakfast.

items.definition_en: A pomegranate is a round fruit filled with red seeds.
items.example_en: She added pomegranate to her salad.

items.definition_en: A fig is a small fruit with purple or green skin and soft inside.
items.example_en: They grew figs in the garden.

items.definition_en: A lime is a small, green fruit with a sour taste.
items.example_en: He squeezed lime over the tacos.
